generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX 2-D LiDAR sensor for raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointClouds
]
instance DepthCameraD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera for stereo imagery and depth data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On-board vehicle speed sensor derived from wheel encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]
instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor derived from servo position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]
instance MotorVoltageActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor voltage command for vehicle speed control"
]
instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering-servo voltage command for steering angle control"
]
instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency-braking command overriding normal speed control"
]
instance RawLiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]
instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraD435i
]
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]
instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point-Cloud Clustering & Tracking component (Data-Pre-Processing FE) for LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RawLiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data-Translation FE for serialisation and unit conversion of all sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RawLiDARPointClouds, DepthCameraData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
]
instance EgoStateData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Time-stamped ego-vehicle state data (speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]
instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Processed object track data from LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler, ThreeDVisualizationEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]
instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing time-stamped ego-state and object-track data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EgoStateData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]
instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control model compliant with ISO 15622 for lead-vehicle detection and speed set-point computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackData, VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance ThreeDVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3-D visualisation model for rendering vehicle state and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackData, EgoStateData
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualisationService
]
instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reporting FE for generating human-readable time-series reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EgoStateData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service: UI visualising real-time vehicle state, projected path and object tracks with time-series reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedPathInsight
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service: ACC algorithm running in DT to relieve on-board ECU"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationInsight
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Remote Management service: UI enabling operator decisions for ACC control and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction, AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]
instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Data Storage service for persistent storage of time-stamped ego-state and object-track data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]
instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Reporting service for generating human-readable time-series analysis reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesReportsInsight
]
instance ThreeDVisualisationService : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "3D Visualisation service for rendering vehicle state and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualisationInsight, ProjectedPathVisualisationInsight
]
instance VehicleSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed insight for monitoring and decision-making"
]
instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle insight for monitoring and decision-making"
]
instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Real-time object track insight for obstacle detection and path planning"
]
instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Projected path insight for ACC trajectory visualization"
]
instance ACCComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Diagnostic insight from ACC algorithm computations"
]
instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to enable or disable ACC functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to adjust desired speed set-point"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to trigger emergency braking override"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Insight from stored time-stamped ego-state and object-track data for diagnostics"
]
instance TimeSeriesReportsInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Human-readable time-series reports for later analysis"
]
instance VehicleStateVisualisationInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "3D visualisation of vehicle state for real-time monitoring"
]
instance ProjectedPathVisualisationInsight : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "3D visualisation of projected path for ACC trajectory"
]
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LX, DepthCameraD435i, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorVoltageActuator, SteeringServoActuator, EmergencyBrakeActuator
]
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler, ThreeDVisualizationEnabler, ReportingEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance ROS2Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware and DDS transport for intra-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, DataStorageService, ReportingService, ThreeDVisualisationService
]
instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, DataStorageService, ReportingService, ThreeDVisualisationService
]
instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS 2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, DataStorageService, ReportingService, ThreeDVisualisationService
]
instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex algorithms (e.g., point-cloud clustering)"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands back to the PT over the same Wi‑Fi/ROS 2 channel. These include the desired speed computed by the ACC Controlling FE, enable/disable ACC signals, remote‑set desired speed values, and an emergency‑braking command. The Actuation FE on the Physical Twin Entity receives these commands and drives the motor and steering actuators accordingly."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All DT services operate with a real‑time constraint of ≤100 ms end‑to‑end latency between PT and DT (R7). Clock synchronisation across all DTS components is required to an accuracy of 100 ms (R8). Consequently, data collection, processing, and actuation occur at rates sufficient to meet these latency bounds, typically on the order of tens of milliseconds per perception‑control cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows the ISO 23247 reference architecture: the Physical Twin Entity hosts sensor drivers and actuation FE, the Digital Twin Entity hosts Data‑Collecting, Controlling, Presentation, Reporting and Data‑Storage FE, and the User Entity hosts the User‑Interface FE split into 3‑D visualisation and control‑panel components. Cross‑System Data‑Translation FE mediates data format conversion. Communication is ROS 2 intra‑entity and Wi‑Fi inter‑entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during the design/development stage as a high‑fidelity simulation and experimentation platform, and during the operation stage for runtime monitoring, remote management and performance reporting. It therefore spans the designed/ideal and operated life‑cycle stages of the vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by using real sensor streams (LiDAR, depth camera, vehicle speed/steering) and by running the ACC algorithm in real time with latency ≤100 ms. Validity is supported by adherence to ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, clock synchronisation to 100 ms, and by storing raw and processed data for post‑hoc analysis. No explicit verification or uncertainty quantification procedures are described."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The PT and DT communicate over a 802.11 Wi‑Fi network using ROS 2 DDS as the transport protocol. All inter‑entity messages are serialised by the Data‑Translation FE, which also handles unit conversion. The standardized communication interface required by R1 is satisfied by ROS 2 topics and services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity runs on external compute hardware (e.g., a workstation or cloud server) distinct from the PT’s Jetson devices. Each Functional Entity is packaged as a separate ROS 2 node set and deployed on the hardware that hosts the corresponding entity: Physical Twin Entity on the Jetson Orin Nano, Digital Twin Entity on the external host, and User Entity on a user workstation displaying the UI."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT design follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) for the layered reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC functional specifications, ISO/IEC 30173:2023 for digital‑twin terminology, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for the 100 ms latency requirement. Communication uses ROS 2, a de‑facto standard for robotic middleware, and mentions OPC UA as a potential implementation for data translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations are explicitly addressed: the DT must maintain ≤100 ms latency (R7) and 100 ms clock synchronisation (R8) to support real‑time, safety‑critical ACC operation; the ACC algorithm complies with ISO 15622; remote‑management commands (enable/disable ACC, emergency braking) are designed with a Human‑in‑the‑Loop model. No specific cybersecurity mechanisms are described in the document."
]
